restore.title: Restore {tab} to Defaults
restore.body: Are you sure you want to restore the {tab} settings to defaults?
restore.warning: This will overwrite all current configuration in this tab. This action cannot be undone.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the look and feel of your workspace using themes, colors, and typography.

presets.title: Theme Presets
presets.description: Select a predefined theme for a quick aesthetic change.

customization.title: Active Theme Customization
customization.description: Fine-tune colors and fonts for the "{name}" theme.

duplicate.title: Duplicate Theme
duplicate.label: New Theme Name
duplicate.error: A theme with this name or ID already exists.

delete.title: Delete Theme
delete.body: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
delete.warning: This action cannot be undone. All custom color and font settings for this theme will be permanently deleted.

keybindings.title: Keybindings
keybindings.description: Configure keyboard shortcuts for navigation, editing, and assistant actions. Shortcuts are automatically applied globally.

ai.title: AI Providers
ai.description: Manage multiple AI provider configurations and select the active provider.
ai.noProviders: No AI providers yet. Add one above.

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Define specialized assistant personas with custom prompts. Agents can have their own set of instruction files that extend global behavior.

globalPrompts.title: Global System Prompts
globalPrompts.description: These prompt files are prepended to every assistant interaction.
globalPrompts.removeBody: Are you sure you want to remove this file from the agent?

profiles.title: Agent Profiles
profiles.description: Switch between different personas for specific tasks.
profiles.noAgents: No agents yet. Add one above.

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Enable or disable built-in tools that allow the AI to interact with your system. These tools enable the assistant to perform file management, web search, terminal execution, and more.
tools.capabilitiesDesc: Toggle individual tools to control what the assistant can do.

skills.title: Skills
skills.pageDescription: Extend the assistant's capabilities with custom scripts. You can add folders containing skill definitions that the assistant can execute.
skills.folderSectionDescription: Directories where Aynite looks for skill implementations.
skills.removeModalBody: Are you sure you want to remove the folder

commands.title: Commands
commands.pageDescription: Manage custom shell commands and automation tasks. You can add folders containing command definitions.
commands.folderSectionDescription: Directories where Aynite looks for command definitions.
commands.removeModalBody: Are you sure you want to remove the folder

about.title: About Aynite
about.description: Information about Aynite, system updates, and developer resources.

update.title: Software Updates
update.description: Keep the app up to date with the latest features.
update.saveWorkMsg: Save your work, then quit and install the update.
update.errorMsg: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
update.upToDateMsg: Your software is up to date.
update.statusReady: Ready to install. Quit & install the update.

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: Join the community and help improve the project.
resources.githubDesc: View source code, submit issues, and contribute on GitHub.
resources.reportIssueDesc: Submit a bug report or feature request on GitHub.

analytics.title: Usage Analytics
analytics.description: Help improve Aynite by sharing anonymous usage data.
analytics.privacyNotice: We collect basic usage metrics like feature usage frequency and performance data. No personally identifiable information or file contents are ever sent.

about.footer: Free your data. Free your interface.

zh.name: 设置
zh.description: 应用程序设置和配置面板

restore.title: 恢复 {tab} 为默认值
restore.body: 确定要将 {tab} 设置恢复为默认值吗？
restore.warning: 这将覆盖该选项卡的所有当前配置。此操作无法撤销。

appearance.title: 外观
appearance.description: 使用主题、自定义颜色和排版自定义您的工作区的外观和感觉。

presets.title: 主题预设
presets.description: 选择一个预定义主题以快速更改美学风格。

customization.title: 活跃主题自定义
customization.description: 微调 "{name}" 主题的颜色和字体。

duplicate.title: 复制主题
duplicate.label: 新主题名称
duplicate.error: 已存在同名或同ID的主题。

delete.title: 删除主题
delete.warning: 此操作无法撤销。该主题的所有自定义颜色和字体设置将被永久删除。

keybindings.title: 快捷键
keybindings.description: 配置导航、编辑和助手操作的键盘快捷键。快捷键会自动全局应用。

ai.title: AI 提供商
ai.description: 管理多个 AI 提供商配置并选择活跃的提供商。
ai.noProviders: 暂无 AI 提供商。点击上方添加。

agents.title: 智能体
agents.description: 使用自定义提示定义专门的助手角色。智能体可以拥有自己的指令文件集，这些文件扩展了全局行为。

globalPrompts.title: 全局系统提示
globalPrompts.description: 这些提示文件会被预置到每次助手交互中。
globalPrompts.removeBody: 确定要从智能体移除文件吗？

profiles.title: 智能体角色
profiles.description: 为特定任务切换不同角色。
profiles.noAgents: 暂无智能体。点击上方添加。

tools.title: 工具
tools.description: 启用或禁用 AI 与系统交互的内置工具。这些工具允许助手执行文件管理、网络搜索和终端执行等操作。
tools.capabilitiesDesc: 切换各个工具以控制助手可以执行的操作。

skills.title: 技能
skills.pageDescription: 通过自定义脚本扩展助手的能力。您可以添加包含技能定义的文件夹，助手可以执行这些技能。
skills.folderSectionDescription: Aynite 寻找技能实现的目录。
skills.detectedSectionDescription: 从已配置文件夹加载的技能。

commands.title: 命令
commands.pageDescription: 管理自定义 shell 命令和自动化任务。您可以添加包含命令定义的文件夹。
commands.folderSectionDescription: Aynite 寻找命令定义的目录。
commands.detectedSectionDescription: 从已配置文件夹加载的命令。

about.title: 关于 Aynite
about.description: 关于 Aynite、系统更新和开发者资源的信息。

update.title: 软件更新
update.description: 保持应用程序具有最新功能。
update.saveWorkMsg: 保存您的工作，然后退出并安装更新。
update.errorMsg: 发生未知错误。请稍后重试。
update.upToDateMsg: 您的软件已是最新版本。
update.statusReady: 准备安装。退出并安装更新。

resources.title: 资源
resources.description: 加入社区并帮助改进项目。
resources.githubDesc: 在 GitHub 上查看源代码、提交问题和贡献。
resources.reportIssueDesc: 在 GitHub 上提交错误报告或功能请求。

analytics.title: 使用分析
analytics.description: 通过分享匿名使用数据帮助改进 Aynite。
analytics.privacyNotice: 我们收集基本的使用指标，如功能使用频率和性能数据。不会发送任何个人身份信息或文件内容。

about.footer: 释放您的数据。释放您的界面。
